identity.title: Cocktails && Code
identity.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (99 BPM) G minor track blending smooth synth pads and crisp drum programming with a laid-back hip-hop vocal flow that balances late-night cocktail lounge vibes with the rhythmic precision of coding logic.

lyrics.text:
Uh, yeah,
uh,
woo
Summer night, laptop glow
Little
ice in the glass
We workin' different now, come on
Cocktails and coke
Watch the new me low
We don't move like before
No, no, no
Uh,
yeah
Uh,
uh, yeah
Sunset drippin' through the blinds like gold
Same little room but the dream got bold
Glass on the table with the ice half low
Got my mind on fire and my laptop glow
I used to scroll when the day went dead
Same old worries runnin' loops in my head
Now I open up a new tab, breathe it slow
Type one question and the whole world grows
I ain't tryna flex like I know it all
I just stopped waitin' on the miracle call
One small bill, one clean plan
One more scale, one more scale
And the palm of my hand
AI talkin', I'm talkin' back
Turnin' little ideas into somethin' that lasts
Summer breeze comin' through the screen
Feels like palm trees livin' in the machine
One little focus with the moonlight
Add a little rhythm to the grind
They don't have to run from the daylight
We can make a way this time
Cocktails and coke
That's how the night unfolds
Got a little dream in the glass
Got a little fire in the soul
Cocktails and coke
Watch the new me load
I can feel that future gettin' closer
Every time I take control
Sip, sip, sip,
sip, sip, sip
Type it up, build, build, level up
No more waitin' on the world
We gon' make it come to us
Cocktails and coke
That's how the night unfolds
Summon my sores cold
Watch the new me load
Cocktails and coke
I used to think the good life had a gate
It's somebody at the front saying
Wait, wait, wait
Now I see the lock, got a pattern to it
Learn a little logic, put some action through it
Debug my doubt, clean up my days
Automate the noise, let the stress drift away
Build me a page, build me a flow
Build me a bridge where the army won't go
It ain't magic, but it feel like that
When the idea hits and the beat comes back
Baseline walking like it knows my name
808 snap like a champagne frame
I want beach chairs paid from the things I made
Not another short break that I barely save
I want Monday soft, I want time that's mine
I want sunlight sitting on a better design
Just a little focus with the moonlight
Add a little rhythm to the grind
We don't have to run from the daylight
We can make a way this time
Cocktails and coke, that's how the night unfolds
Got a little dream in the glass
Got a little fire in the soul
Cocktails and coke, watch the new me load
I can feel that picture getting closer
Let's go
Every time I take control
Sit, sit, sit
Sit, sit, sit, tap it up
Build, build, have a love
No more waiting on the world
We gon' make it come to us
Cocktails and coke
That's how the night unfolds
Summoning my source code
Watch the new me load
Maybe the beach ain't far away
Maybe it starts with what I make
Maybe the life I used to chase
Is hiding in the habits I create
No more wishing on the moon
No more waiting for the right sky
I got rhythm, I got a time
I got something new in my mind
Prop me a plan, I put feet on it
Dream looking clean when I keep on it
Small wins stacking like sunlight
One more commit in the midnight
Class by the keys, breeze at the dope
I don't wanna be tired no more
I don't wanna just talk that growth
I wanna build that boat and float
Cocktails and coke, that's how the night unfolds
Got a little dream in the glass
Got a little fire in the soul
Cocktails and coke
Watch the new me load
I can feel that that you're getting closer
Every time I take control
Sit, sit, sit
Sip, sip, sip, top it up
Build, build, have a love
No more waiting on the world
We gon' make it come to us
Cocktails and coke
That's how the night unfolds
Summoning my source code
Watch the new me load
Cocktails and coke
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
Watch the new me load
Ooh, ooh
Summoning my source code
No, we don't move like before
Yeah, ice in the glass
Future in the tabs

analysis.summary: A nocturnal fusion of hip-hop flow and electronic textures that chronicles an artist's transformation from passive worry to active creation through late-night coding sessions paired with contemplative cocktail culture.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Soft cyan light reflecting off a laptop screen and glass ice cubes in a dark room, volumetric lighting creating floating dust particles.
Invisible geometric grids forming over a cluttered desk, clean lines connecting to the outside sunset, sharp focus on keyboard keys.
A single beam of moonlight illuminating only hands typing rapidly while the rest of the room fades into soft bokeh shadows.
Red error symbols dissolving into green checkmarks, visualizing mental noise turning clear as liquid drains from a glass.
A digital horizon line rising above the skyline, composed of binary code transforming into architectural blueprints and palm tree silhouettes.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)

next: lexicon: node scripts/lexicon/harvest.mjs (reads the planet-full.json), then dream + publish
full show: merge analysis+interactions into tracks.planet; lyrics_synced from transcript words
